provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Tsetse Fly Control Order.

provisions.title: Directions
provisions.content:
2. Directions
All persons travelling on the following roads shall, if so required by an administrative officer, pass through the de-flying chambers specified below together with their vehicles, donkeys, horses or other draught animals:
Sankuyu to Maun Road
